description.value:
This small box contains a variety of papers and parchments, pens and inks, seals and sealing wax, gold and silver leaf, and other supplies necessary to create convincing forgeries of physical documents.

Proficiency with this kit lets you add your proficiency bonus to any skill checks you make to do the following; create a physical forgery of a document, Badges, ID's, and signatures.

A creature who interacts with your forgeries may attempt to see through it if they are unsure of its validity.

If they do, they make an Intelligence (Investigation) check vs an Intelligence, Dexterity, or Wisdom (Forgery Kit) check (DM's choice based on the type of forgery.)

A creature who fails cannot find any issues or faults with the forgery.

Simple Forgeries (1 Charge).

A simple forgery is a quick and typically uninvolved forging of a signature, creating a simple letterhead or copying the handwriting of another individual.

Simple forgeries take no more than 10 minutes and require an example of what is being forged.

Complicated Forgeries (2 Charges).

A complicated forgery is a forgery that requires more involvement from the preparer.

This includes perfectly copying or rewriting an entire handwritten document of no more than one page, while adding or removing text, words or sentences.

Creating new letterheads with gold or silver foil.

Copying a complex drawing or sketch.

Or recreating the frame of a wax seal.

A complicated forgery requires no more than 1 hour an example of what is being forged.

Exquisite Forgeries (3 Charges).

Exquisite Forgeries involve expert skill and insight, along with vast amounts of time and patience.

Over the course of 8 hours or a long rest, you can recreate any multiple page document regardless of length, create old and new wax seals, create impossible to distinguish ID cards for a single creature, recreate portraits.

Some tasks may require more than 8 hours of uninterrupted work and instead may require multiple days of work (DM's discretion).
